raw_transcript: Doctor, it's terrible. I'm going twelve, maybe fifteen times a day. It's almost all blood and urgency. I can't even leave the house because I'm afraid I won't make it to a bathroom in time.
final_corrected_note: Doctor, it's terrible. I'm going twelve, maybe fifteen times a day. It's almost all blood and urgency. I can't even leave the house because I'm afraid I won't make it to a bathroom in time.
